rootCause: The browser bootstrap returned early as soon as a Chromium executable file existed, so Linux system dependency installation never ran. In minimal environments this left required shared libs (for example libatk-1.0.so.0) missing, causing Playwright launch failures.
resolution: Changed ensurePlaywrightBrowsers to run install-deps before the early return on existing Chromium binaries, and added a regression test that enforces this ordering.
